output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P166 ?award1 , ?award2 , ?award3 .
  ?award1 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ; pq:P7101 ?season1 .
  ?award2 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ; pq:P7101 ?season2 .
  ?award3 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ; pq:P7101 ?season3 .
  ?season1 wdt:P580 ?start1 .
  ?season2 wdt:P580 ?start2 .
  ?season3 wdt:P580 ?start3 .
  FILTER(?season1 != ?season2 && ?season2 != ?season3 && ?season1 != ?season3)
  .
  BIND(YEAR(?start1) AS ?y1)
  BIND(YEAR(?start2) AS ?y2)
  BIND(YEAR(?start3) AS ?y3)
  FILTER(?y2 = ?y1 + 1)
  FILTER(?y3 = ?y2 + 1)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
}

  ?season3 wdt:P580 ?start3.

  BIND(YEAR(?start2) AS ?y2)
  BIND(YEAR(?start3) AS ?y3)

  FILTER(?y2 = ?y1 + 1)
  FILTER(?y3 = ?y2 + 1)

  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en") }
}
LIMIT 100

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel
WHERE {
  ?player p:P166 ?award1, ?award2, ?award3 .
  ?award1 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ;
          pq:P7101 ?season1 .
  ?award2 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ;
          pq:P7101 ?season2 .
  ?award3 ps:P166 wd:Q1430942 ;
          pq:P7101 ?season3 .

  ?season1 wdt:P580 ?start1 .
  ?season2 wdt:P580 ?start2 .
  ?season3 wdt:P580 ?start3 .

  FILTER (?season1 != ?season2 && ?season2 != ?season3 && ?season1 != ?season3) .

  BIND(YEAR(?start1) AS ?y1)
  BIND(YEAR(?start2) AS ?y2)
  BIND(YEAR(?start3) AS ?y3)

  FILTER (?y2 = ?y1 + 1)
  FILTER (?y3 = ?y2 + 1)

  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en") } .
}
args.answer: Michael Jordan and George Gervin are the NBA scoring champions who held the title for at least 3 consecutive years.
